title: IRVINE

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Masimo's Bridge™ device provides opioid withdrawal symptom relief in as little as 20 minutes with an 85% reduction in symptoms within one hour.",
    "Masimo has over 600 patents and many firsts in medical innovation.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic highlighted the essential role of life sciences in developing solutions to global challenges.",
    "California's restoration of the R&D tax credit has significant impacts on the state's innovation economy and job creation.",
    "Robust R&D investments by California life sciences companies positioned the state to lead the global pandemic response.",
    "California's decision to restore financial incentives for research helps smaller companies survive the process of bringing innovations to market.",
    "The opioid epidemic worsened during the COVID-19 pandemic, with an estimated 100,306 drug overdose deaths reported in the U.S. from April 2020 to April 2021.",
    "Opioid-induced respiratory depression can cause brain damage in 2 to 3 minutes and death in as little as 5 minutes.",
    "Opioids were involved in nearly 70% of all overdose deaths in California.",
    "An estimated 100,000 Americans and 10,000 Californians died of drug overdoses in the year ending April 2021, with 64% of those deaths caused by fentanyl."
  ]
}
```
